title: dicranopteris
intro: Dicranopteris, also known as the male fern or centella, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of dicranopteris include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as supporting liver and kidney function. Dicranopteris can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
